name: Cul-De-Sac
short_description: Cul-De-Sac is an immersive ghost hunting experience / simulation. Walk around exploring a small neighborhood to investigate the strange occurrences and locate the entity's personal item using a range of ghost hunting tools and burn it to set her free into the realm beyond ours.
detailed_description:
Overview:

Ever since the mysterious death of a young girl in a quiet suburban neighborhood in Pleasant Valley, the local residents have resorted to abandoning their homes to find safety for them and their families. It's up to you to help bring peace to this Cul-De-Sac by looking for the entity's personal belonging and burning it using sacred burning materials that have been slowly appearing since that fateful day in this immersive ghost hunting experience.

Experience:

Walk around a small neighborhood investigating strange events to try and locate what is believed to be the young girl's personal item, keeping her tied to the world of the living and causing problems for the locals.

While you're investigating, be sure to pick up all the strange looking materials emitting an evil aura, they could be your only hope in destroying the entity's personal item.

When you're sure you've got the right item, make your way back to the local church and burn it. Just hope you haven't made a mistake...

Mechanics:

Explore a small neighborhood cul de sac of four houses to locate a single item of a bunch of randomly dispersed items throughout the area. You'll also be tasked to locate "sacred burn materials" to use in the aid of destroying the entity's personal item, also randomly dispersed throughout the map. 

Find a way into the residents' houses and look around for anything that can be useful. Scrap used for crafting gear, batteries to keep your flashlight charged, and lighters to light candles and burn the ghost's item.

While you're searching for the item, try to find the murder weapon and crime scene to complete side objectives that will help assist you during the main mission.

Avoid being killed by the ghost, who has a small variety of abilities and attacks to use against you ranging from simple item throws, light switch flipping, and door touching, all the way to lethal hunting, deadly hide and seek, and phantom scares.

Notice:

This game is primarily a single player experience. As of now, the Multiplayer functionality is working but may contain bugs.

As a solo developer who works on games as a hobby, updates for this game may be sparse and occasionally come in waves. If you have any questions or concerns, you should head over to the discord and reach out to me there.
